common.profileAlt: Profile photo of Rodrigo Fuentealba Cartes

home.bio: Computer Science Engineer with over 20 years of experience in the software industry.

about.subtitle: Licensed engineer and Computer Science Engineer with over 20 years of industry experience. Chess player, motorcyclist, radio amateur, and athlete.
about.history: I was born on February 22, 1983 in Talcahuano, Bío-Bío Region, Chile. I graduated as a Programmer Analyst in 2008, and later as a Licensed Engineer in Engineering Sciences and Computer Science Engineer in 2024, with Cum Laude distinction. I currently live in the city of Talca, Maule Region, Chile.
about.experience: I have over 20 years of experience in the software industry, working on projects of various kinds, from web applications to enterprise management systems.
about.interestsIntro: Beyond my professional work, I have a wide range of interests:
about.kickboxingNote: Kickboxing: I train at <brutalStrikerLink>Brutal Striker Talca</brutalStrikerLink>.
about.radioClubNote: <radioLink>Amateur radio</radioLink>: I belong to the <radioClubLink>Radio Club Lircay de Talca CE4LY</radioClubLink>, and I also maintain its website.

services.title: Services
services.intro: I offer independent professional services in Data Science, Computer Science Engineering, and Project Management. Each project is approached in a personalized way, tailoring solutions to the client's specific needs and business context. If you have a project in mind, feel free to <contactLink>get in touch</contactLink>.

dataScience.name: Data Science
dataScience.description: Analysis, modeling, and interpretation of data to extract actionable insights, develop predictive models, and support evidence-based decision-making.

software.name: Software Engineering
software.description: Design, development, and maintenance of software solutions, from system architecture to implementation, with a focus on quality, scalability, and best practices.

databases.name: Databases
databases.description: Design of entity-relationship models for software development and data analytics projects.

pm.name: Project Management
pm.description: Planning, coordination, and tracking of technology projects, ensuring deadlines, resources, and objectives are met using agile or traditional methodologies.

consulting.name: Consulting
consulting.description: Specialized technical advisory in technology and information systems, aimed at optimizing processes, evaluating solutions, and guiding strategic decisions.

training.name: Training
training.description: Practical, personalized training in tools, languages, and technology methodologies, for teams and professionals looking to develop or strengthen skills in data and software.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Write to me and I will reply as soon as possible. Fields marked with <required>*</required> are required.
contact.success: Message sent successfully. Thank you for getting in touch.

coffee.title: Coffee
coffee.intro: Home recipes using cups, tablespoons, and teaspoons.

espresso.name: Espresso
espresso.recipe: Add 2 tablespoons of coffee and extract one espresso-size cup.

espressoDoppio.name: Espresso Doppio
espressoDoppio.recipe: Add 4 tablespoons of coffee and extract half a regular-size cup.

ristretto.name: Ristretto
ristretto.recipe: Add 2 tablespoons of coffee and extract half an espresso-size cup.

lungo.name: Lungo
lungo.recipe: Add 2 tablespoons of coffee and extract half a regular-size cup.

americano.name: Americano
americano.recipe: One espresso and 3/4 cup of hot water.

longBlack.name: Long Black
longBlack.recipe: 3/4 cup of hot water, then pour one espresso on top.

latte.name: Latte
latte.recipe: 1 espresso + 1 cup steamed milk with little foam.

caramelMacchiato.name: Caramel Macchiato
caramelMacchiato.recipe: 1 espresso + 1 tablespoon caramel syrup + 1/2 cup steamed milk and foam on top.

cappuccino.name: Cappuccino
cappuccino.recipe: 1 espresso + 2 tablespoons steamed milk + 2 tablespoons foam.

mochaccino.name: Mochaccino
mochaccino.recipe: 1 espresso + 1 tablespoon cocoa or chocolate powder + steamed milk to half a cup.

affogato.name: Affogato
affogato.recipe: 1 scoop vanilla ice cream + 1 hot espresso poured on top.

irish.name: Irish
irish.recipe: 1 cup hot filter coffee + 1 tablespoon Irish whiskey + 1 teaspoon sugar; top with 2 tablespoons cream.

frappe.name: Frappé
frappe.recipe: 1 tablespoon instant coffee + 1 tablespoon cold water (shake), ice, and milk to fill the cup.

chess.title: Chess

pgn.title: Export game
pgn.prompt: Enter your name to include it in the PGN file.

analysis.title: Game analysis
analysis.intro: Paste or load a PGN to review each move with Stockfish: standard symbols, evaluation, and navigation through the game.
analysis.pgnFromPlay: Game loaded from the board. Press «Analyze game» when ready.
analysis.editorHelp: Move pieces on the board to build a game; analysis will use the generated PGN.
analysis.editorRequired: Play at least one move in the editor before analyzing.
analysis.pgnInvalid: Could not read the PGN. Check the format.

terms.title: Terms of Service — @devrfc83
terms.summaryNotice: This is a summary version. The full, legally binding version is available only in Spanish.

summary.title: Acceptance
summary.body: By using this site you accept these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the site.

summary.title: Service
summary.body: Personal site with blog, portfolio, open-source projects, newsletter, and contact form.

summary.title: Intellectual property
summary.body: Original content belongs to the owner of @devrfc83. Downloadable code is governed by the license stated in each project.

summary.title: Privacy
summary.body: Only data you voluntarily provide is collected. No tracking cookies or third-party analytics.

summary.title: Liability
summary.body: The site and downloads are provided "as is." The owner is not liable for damages arising from use.

summary.title: Contact
summary.body: For questions about these terms, use the site's contact form.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — @devrfc83
privacy.summaryNotice: This is a summary version. The full, legally binding version is available only in Spanish.

summary.title: Controller
summary.body: The owner of @devrfc83, based in Chile. Inquiries via the contact form.

summary.title: Data collected
summary.body: Only data you voluntarily provide: contact (name, email, message), newsletter (email), and aggregated HTTP metrics without individual identification.

summary.title: Use
summary.body: To respond to inquiries, send the newsletter, and technical monitoring. No advertising or profiling.

summary.title: Third parties
summary.body: Data is not sold or shared except where legally required. The email provider acts only as a processor.

summary.title: Your rights
summary.body: You may access, rectify, delete your data, and withdraw consent by contacting the owner.

summary.title: Legal basis
summary.body: Voluntary consent. Operation in accordance with Chile's Law No. 19,628.
